Upcoming Events

Mark your calendars for these upcoming opportunities

CompetitionFeatured Event

IAAA National Innovation Challenge 2026

Annual innovation challenge for student teams across India to showcase aerospace innovations.

March 15-17, 2026Chennai, Tamil Nadu
Learn More
Career Fair

Aerospace Career Fair 2026

Connect with leading aerospace companies and explore career opportunities.

April 10, 2026Bengaluru, Karnataka
Learn More
Admissions

PTDC Admission Drive - Summer 2026

Summer admissions open for PTDC diploma and training programs.

May 1-15, 2026Pan India (Online + Regional Hubs)
Learn More
Workshop

Drone Tech Workshop

Hands-on workshop on drone design, assembly, and flight operations.

June 8-9, 2026Hyderabad, Telangana
